Petition For Instructions Re Payment Of Trustee Fees
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-04-286107 Estate of Anne Shirley Outin and
PTR-18-302220 The Anne S. Outin Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: William Holsinger appeared by zoom for and with Debra Dolch (trustee/administrator) by zoom.
Courtney Sorenson appeared by zoom for Royal National Institute for the Blind (ultimate beneficiary).
Genevieve Duran appeared by zoom for Carr McClellan (former firm for the executor/trustee).

The court asked what the path forward is to ensure that Mrs. Dolch gets paid for her services performed and stated that its thought is to tell the appropriate party to seek compensation in the estate matter characterizing her work on the trust as extraordinary fees. Mr. Holsinger stated that because the trust came out of the estate, he believes that the court could find that Thorpe v Reed does not apply, and that fees could be paid out of the trust action, but he has no objection to the court's suggestion. Mrs. Sorenson and Mrs. Duran have no objections. Mr. Holsinger stated that the petitions for final distribution are in process and will be done fairly shortly. The Petition for Instructions Re Payment of Trustee Fees in Related Action, and the Petition for Instructions Re Payment of Trustee Fees are under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belem. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-04-286107 Estate of Anne Shirley Outin and
PTR-18-302220 The Anne S. Outin Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: William Holsinger appeared by zoom for Debra Dolch (administrator/trustee).
Craig Weinstein appeared by zoom for Royal National Institute for the Blind (beneficiary).

The court instructed Mr. Holsinger to file a petition for final distribution and stated that if the other side wants money, they should ask for it, file an objection or request it at the time of final distribution. Status on close of estate, and status of the final account are continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Holsinger is to have his petitions filed by then.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Petiton For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Of The Anne S. Outin Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-04-286107 The Estate of Anne Shirley Outin and
PTR-18-302220 The Anne S. Outin Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: Nicole Warmerdam for Debra Dolch.

The Court noted that the Administrator has died and questions whether Ms. Dolch will be doing an accounting for the period during which there was a vacancy. The Court also informed Counsel that if Ms. Dolch does not do the accountings for the mentioned period of time, that her law firm will need to do one, that she needs to do a corrected/amended inventory and appraisal separating the estate assets from the trust assets, and that the accountings will need to be done in two year groupings/segments before a current accounting can step up. Ms. Warmerdam stated that Ms. Dolch intends to proceed with an accounting from her date of appointment forward, that she has not discussed the issue of prior accountings with Ms. Dolch, and that she has bifurcated the assets and that she will file an amended inventory. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed and the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee (subject to review of the orders). Bond in the amount of $380,000.00 is required in the estate matter. Status on close of estate is for May 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Bond in the amount of $928,000.00 is required in the Trust matter. Status on filing of the accountings is set for February 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 in both matters. Status on filing of the corrected inventory and appraisals is set for January 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 in both matters.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Petiton For Appointment Of Successor Trustee Of The Anne S. Outin Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
